description: V1.8 engine asset pipeline loop exists and is marked as the active loop.
evidence: Created V1_8_ENGINE_ASSET_PIPELINE_LOOP_PROMPT.md and loop-v1-8-engine-asset-pipeline status directory; ACTIVE_LOOP.md points to V1.8.

description: V1.8 requirements, delivery goals, non-goals, and route decision are documented.
evidence: V1_8_ENGINE_ASSET_PIPELINE_LOOP_PROMPT.md documents C方案为主, standard validation, deliverables, non-goals, and success criteria.

description: The sidecar geography knowledge base records the V1.8 engine asset pipeline decision and current status.
evidence: WESTEROS_GEOGRAPHY_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md version V1.2 records V1.8 as the active loop, adds C方案 as the architecture principle, and includes section 13 for engine asset pipeline validation.

description: The project constraint file records the V1.8 architecture direction change.
evidence: WESTEROS_INTERACTIVE_MAP_CONSTRAINTS.md includes the 2026-06-21 V1.8 requirement change, C方案 preference, standard validation scope, sample region, and downgrade rule.

description: A V1.8 design spec is written for engine-authored assets with web runtime and CMS management.
A V1.8 implementation plan is written and ready for execution.
evidence: Created docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-21-westeros-v18-engine-asset-pipeline.md with tasks for types, mock manifest, Engine Asset Lab route, E2E, docs, screenshots, and verification.

description: A V1.8 Engine Asset Lab or equivalent experimental frontend route exists.
evidence: Implemented /engine-lab via apps/westeros-map/src/app/(frontend)/engine-lab/page.tsx and apps/westeros-map/src/components/engine-lab/*.tsx. E2E confirms [data-engine-lab] and tile-north-winterfell-v1 render.

description: A modular North / Winterfell sandtable sample asset or simulated asset pipeline is produced.
evidence: Created apps/westeros-map/src/data/mock/engineAssetLab.ts with material set, North / Winterfell terrain tile, terrain/landmark/forest/route/water/weather/anchor layers, and winterfell anchor metadata.

description: CMS-facing asset metadata requirements are specified for terrain tiles, prefabs, materials, source files, and map anchors.
evidence: Created apps/westeros-map/src/types/engineAsset.ts defining source tools, export formats, material sets, layers, terrain tiles, anchors, risk levels, and future source/public asset paths for CMS-facing metadata.

description: Visual screenshots prove the V1.8 asset lab direction is visible and does not break V1.7.
evidence: Captured screenshots under apps/westeros-map/test-results/visual-v1-8-engine-asset-pipeline/: 1440x900-engine-lab.png, 1920x1080-engine-lab.png, 1440x900-engine-lab-weather-off.png. Existing V1.7 E2E tests remain passing.

description: typecheck, lint, unit tests, E2E tests, and production build pass after V1.8 changes.
evidence: Verification passed: npm run typecheck, npm run lint, npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e (13 passed), npm run build. Build includes static /engine-lab route.

description: V1.8 concludes with a recommendation: continue engine-authored web runtime, switch to Unity WebGL, or stay with high-fidelity 2.5D web.
evidence: Recommendation: continue engine-authored web runtime validation. Keep the production site as high-fidelity Web 2.5D while using engine / 3D tools as an asset authoring pipeline. Do not migrate the whole project to Unity / Unreal runtime yet.
